name: remove_reaction_from_item
description: Removes an emoji reaction from a message, file, or file comment in slack.

file.description: ID of the file to remove the reaction from.

name.description:
Name of the emoji reaction to remove (e.g., 'thumbsup'), without colons.
Examples:
  "thumbsup"
  "smile"
  "robot_face"

channel.description: Channel ID of the message. Required if `timestamp` is provided.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the message. Required if `channel` is provided.

file_comment.description: ID of the file comment to remove the reaction from.
